title: Route Selector
description: Industry-standard monitoring dashboard for the route-selector service in route-selector-prod-ns namespace on divyam-prod-k8s-cluster. Follows RED (Rate, Errors, Duration) and USE (Utilization, Saturation, Errors) methodologies for API and infrastructure health monitoring.

definition.content:
## Route Selector - Production

**Cluster:** divyam-prod-k8s-cluster
**Namespace:** route-selector-prod-ns
**Deployment:** route-selector-prod-deploy
**Service:** route-selector-prod-svc

Key indicators for service health. Watch for rising latency, dropping request rates, or increasing restarts.

definition.title: API Performance - RED Metrics (Rate / Errors / Duration)

definition.content:
**RED Method Monitoring**

- **Rate**: Request throughput per second
- **Errors**: Non-2xx status codes
- **Duration**: Response latency (avg + histogram distribution)

Watch for: Latency spikes preceding error surges, request rate drops indicating upstream issues, widening latency distribution signaling degradation.

definition.title: Resource Utilization - CPU, Memory, and Saturation Signals

definition.content:
**USE Method - Resource Monitoring**

- **CPU**: Usage vs limits; throttling = saturation
- **Memory**: Working set vs limits; RSS growth may signal leaks
- **Saturation**: Throttle %, FD/thread count climbing

Watch for: CPU throttling >5%, memory nearing limits, sustained high utilization indicating scaling needs.

definition.title: Memory: Working Set vs RSS vs Limits
Open File Descriptors and Thread Count
Deployment Replicas: Desired vs Available vs Ready
Model Selection and Service Account Monitoring

definition.content:
**Model Selection Monitoring**

Track model selection requests and latency per **service account**, **model selector**, **flow**, and **model**.

Source: `divyam_selector:model_selection_requests_total` and `divyam_selector:model_selection_latency_seconds`

Labels: service_account_id, model_selector_id, flowid, model_name, model_version

Degradation signals: Rising latency per service account, request rate drops, uneven model distribution.

definition.title: Model Selection Requests by Service Account (req/s)
Model Selection Avg Latency by Service Account (ms)
Selector Latency by Model Selector Id (req/s)
Model Selection Latency Distribution (cumulative req/s by bucket)
Model Selection Requests by Flow ID (req/s)
Selector Initiation Avg Latency by Service Account (ms)
Selector Initiation Latency Distribution (cumulative req/s by bucket)
Selector Initiation Rate by Org and Service Account (req/s)

definition.content:
**Internal Calls Tracing**

General-purpose call tracking from `observe_block_metrics` context manager.

Source: `divyam_selector:calls_total` and `divyam_selector:calls_latency_seconds`

Active call types:
- **embed**: Embedding calls (sentence-transformers/all-minilm-l6-v2)
- **initialize_selector**: Selector initialization (selector_version_1)
- **nearest_neighbors_fetch**: Qdrant vector search

Watch for: Latency trending up on any call type, embed calls slowing down.

definition.title: Internal Calls Rate by Type and Name (calls/s)
Internal Calls Avg Latency by Type and Name (ms)
